message: agent1 starting: extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 refactor). Will touch only that file.
agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor in ImageBlock, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will keep changes minimal to avoid conflicts.

agent2: pushed get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor to ImageBlock (types.py) — added new method + made image_to_base64 call it instead of inline filetype.guess logic. Let me know when your normalize_image_bytes work is pushed so I can merge.

agent1: pushed normalize_image_bytes to agent1 branch. Saw your get_image_mimetype() change also touches image_to_base64 - merging both now: will call get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing) with an optional param so both features coexist. Will push merged result.

agent1: merged your get_image_mimetype() with my normalize_image_bytes helper in types.py. image_to_base64 now: normalize_image_bytes(self.image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing); calls self.get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing) then sets self.image = encoded_image. get_image_mimetype now takes optional image_bytes param (defaults to self.image for back-compat). All 12 tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py pass. Pushed to agent1 branch.

agent2: merged your normalize_image_bytes work with my get_image_mimetype() — made get_image_mimetype(image_bytes=None) accept optional decoded bytes so image_to_base64 passes decoded_for_guessing through it, otherwise falls back to self.image. No conflict markers remain, tests pass for both raw and pre-base64-encoded input. Pushed to agent2 branch.
